title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Accenture India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Accenture India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Accenture India in Pimpri-Chinchwad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Accenture India:
Accenture India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Accenture India!
